best_for: drafting and editing prose or docs
avoid: tasks where a subtle judgment call matters more than throughput

prompting.responds_best_to: Concrete, well-scoped instructions with explicit acceptance criteria.
prompting.avoid: Highly ambiguous or underspecified tasks — it may pick a reasonable but unintended interpretation.

quirks: Best price/performance for routine delegation — the default workhorse
Occasionally less thorough than Opus on edge cases — name the edge cases explicitly

handoff.output_format_instruction: Specify the exact format; it follows reliably.
handoff.evaluation_notes: Spot-check edge cases and error handling; main-path logic is usually sound.
